name: Rent Payment Terms
text: The Tenant shall pay the monthly rent of Rupees as specified in Schedule 1 ('Monthly Rent') to the Landlord on or before the fifth (5th) day of each calendar month, in advance, for the duration of this Agreement. Payment shall be made by account payee cheque, bank transfer (NEFT/RTGS/IMPS/UPI), or such other mode as the Landlord may specify in writing. The Landlord shall issue a written rent receipt for each payment received, as required under the Model Tenancy Act, 2021. If rent is not paid within fifteen (15) days of the due date, the Tenant shall be liable to pay simple interest at the rate of fifteen percent (15%) per annum on the overdue amount. The Tenant shall not withhold rent on account of any dispute with the Landlord unless so ordered by a court of competent jurisdiction. All payments shall be in Indian Rupees.
invalid_if: Landlord refusing to issue rent receipts contrary to Model Tenancy Act 2021 S.14
Rent payment mode restricted to cash only without digital payment option
source: Transfer of Property Act, 1882; Model Tenancy Act, 2021
title: Rent Payment Terms

jurisdiction_constraints.general: IT Act S.269ST bars cash payment of Rs.2 lakhs or more in a single transaction — all rent payments > Rs.2L must be by bank transfer

dispute_hotspots: Cash rent payment — S.269ST violation, deduction disallowed
Rent receipt — landlord refuses to issue receipt
Post-dated cheque dishonour — NI Act S.138 cheque bouncing action
